title: cordylanthus brunneus
intro: Cordylanthus brunneus, also known as the Bruneau valley bird's beak or Brunneau's bird's beak, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. It is a hemiparasitic plant that obtains some of its nutrients by drawing them from the roots of other plants. The medicinal properties of Cordylanthus brunneus include its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of wounds, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
